decisions.reasoning: Iron Hands threatens a 2HKO with Drain Punch and outspeeds via Fake Out if I stay in. Switching to Flutter Mane provides an immunity to Drain Punch and forces the opponent to respect a potential super-effective hit.
I outspeed Iron Hands and Moonblast is a guaranteed OHKO, fulfilling the KO THREAT priority.

Rillaboom threatens an OHKO with Wood Hammer or Drum Beating, and Flutter Mane cannot guarantee a KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot that resists Rillaboom's STAB moves and provides Intimidate support.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, fulfilling the primary decision priority to secure a KO when available.

Since both Incineroars are at a stalemate and Flare Blitz recoil would be detrimental to my weakened Incineroar, Parting Shot is the best play to pivot out, reduce the opponent's stats, and bring in a fresh teammate to gain momentum.

My Incineroar is at 27% and will likely be KO'd by any chip damage or Flare Blitz. Switching to Flutter Mane preserves my Incineroar for a potential Intimidate pivot later while bringing in a faster, higher-pressure threat.

Incineroar threatens an OHKO with Flare Blitz, and I cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to resist the Flare Blitz and potentially pivot or intimidate the opponent to regain momentum.
My Incineroar is at 23% and cannot win this duel; Parting Shot allows me to safely pivot into a healthier teammate while lowering the opponent's offensive stats to mitigate damage.

My Incineroar is at 23% and will likely be KO'd by the opponent's Flare Blitz or Knock Off. Switching to Flutter Mane preserves my Incineroar for a potential Intimidate pivot later while bringing in a faster threat.

Flutter Mane is guaranteed to be OHKOed by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO on Incineroar this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a necessary resist to Flare Blitz to preserve Flutter Mane for later use.
My Incineroar is at 17% HP and cannot win this 1v1. Using Parting Shot allows me to lower the opponent's stats and pivot into a healthier teammate to maintain momentum.
My Incineroar is at 9% HP and will be KO'd by any chip damage, so I must switch to preserve momentum. Flutter Mane is the best pivot to threaten the opponent's Incineroar or force a switch.
Flutter Mane is guaranteed to be OHKOed by Flare Blitz, and I cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot to absorb the physical hit and maintain momentum.
My Incineroar has fainted, so I must bring in a new Pokemon. Calyrex-Ice is a strong neutral option that can threaten the opponent's Incineroar and handle potential switches better than Flutter Mane.

High Horsepower is a 2HKO and forces Incineroar into a defensive position or a switch, while Flare Blitz is only a 2HKO on Calyrex-Ice. Staying in to pressure the Incineroar is the best play to maintain momentum.
Incineroar is at 8% HP, meaning High Horsepower is a guaranteed KO regardless of Intimidate. This removes the opponent's primary pivot and threat to Calyrex-Ice.
